choice: Three sync triggers: manual sync button, sync-on-open, and a best-effort end-of-day scheduled sync (runs only if the day's E*TRADE token is still renewable; otherwise show 'stale since X' and prompt one-tap reconnect). Every successful sync persists a dated balance snapshot.
rationale: User wants manual + on-open + EOD if feasible; EOD is best-effort because E*TRADE tokens die at midnight ET and need interactive re-auth
